text:
Neil Armstrong was a pilot in the **Korean War**.

He served as a naval aviator in the U.S. Navy, joining in 1949. During the Korean War (1950-1953), Armstrong flew 78 combat missions from the aircraft carrier USS Essex. After his active duty concluded in 1952, he transitioned to civilian life as a test pilot before becoming an astronaut.

FINAL ANSWER: Neil Armstrong was a pilot in the Korean War.
